title: Securitize heads to NYSE debut after investors approve SPAC merger
summary: The tokenization firm is expected to begin trading on the NYSE on Thursday, becoming one of the first publicly traded pure-play tokenization companies.

title: Bitcoin lending is entering a new institutional era, according to Silicon Valley Bank
summary: The bank said bitcoin lending has emerged from the 2022 crypto credit collapse with stronger risk controls, growing institutional participation and a path toward lower borrowing costs.

title: JPMorgan urges strong safeguards as congress weighs crypto market structure rules
summary: The bank says Congress should pair regulatory clarity with safeguards as Senate negotiates the Clarity Act.

title: Private keys, not smart contracts, caused 40% of crypto's $16 billion hack losses. Here's whats being done.
summary: The industry is moving toward fixing the private key vulnerability issue, just not evenly, Wish Wu, co-founder and CEO of Pharos, said.

title: White House to speak with law enforcement groups to push Crypto's Clarity Act
summary: Officials from the White House are said to be sitting down with law enforcement representatives who have objected to illicit-finance portions of the bill.
